eagle-eye.settings.debug.name: Debug
eagle-eye.settings.debug.hint: Enable debug console output and vision visualizations
eagle-eye.settings.visionLocation.name: Vision Location
eagle-eye.settings.visionLocation.hint: Location for vision sources to be placed around a token
eagle-eye.settings.increaseDetectionTole: Increase tolerance on token detection by half of the grid size, effectively extending the range of detection modes by half a grid.
